evidence.value_narrative: Before this OBPI, gz-obpi-pipeline existed only as a skill/operator ritual, so hooks and docs could tell an operator to run the pipeline but gzkit did not own a first-class CLI runtime for it. Now uv run gz obpi pipeline <OBPI-ID> exists as a code-owned command surface with launch, --from=verify, and --from=ceremony entry points, active-marker compatibility for the existing ADR-0.12.0 hook chain, and fail-closed blockers for missing or invalid governance prerequisites.

evidence.value_narrative: Before this OBPI, the pipeline only persisted a minimal active marker with obpi_id, started_at, and execution_mode. evidence.value_narrative: Before this OBPI, stale instruction files with applyTo globs matching zero repository paths, foreign-project references carried over from the extraction, drift between canonical instructions and generated rules, and policy-vs-code mismatches all sat undetected. After this OBPI, gz validate --instructions identifies all four defect categories as structured, machine-readable validation errors.
evidence.key_proof: uv run gz validate --instructions --json detects 54 findings: 15 unreachable patterns, 16 foreign references, 14 drifted rule files, 9 code-contract mismatches.
recorder_warnings: Working tree was dirty when the completion receipt was captured.

evidence.value_narrative: Before this OBPI, machine-local permissions and checked-in settings could blur together, weakening trust in generated surfaces. After this OBPI, repo policy and local workstation state are separated and deterministic sync is enforceable.
evidence.key_proof: uv run gz agent sync control-surfaces --dry-run produces deterministic output. detect_claude_settings_drift() returns empty list. 103/103 OBPI-specific tests pass.
